THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, DINO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 132A FREELON $1,221.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,221.30, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 8:00 AM AS TO POSSESSION ONLY. STAY AS TO MONEY TO 12-1-95 PROVIDED DEFT MAKES PAYMENTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
